Plan.path: Plan > Target Audience Analysis > Segmentation > Psychographic segmentation > Personality-trait models > HEXACO model > Conscientiousness (HEXACO) > Perfectionism

Prepare.path: Prepare > Microtarget > Full-spectrum effect configuration space > Individual effect plane > Emotional effects > Fear amplification microtargeting

Execute.path: Execute > Persist in the Information Environment > Full-spectrum effect configuration space > Output effect plane > Behavioural effects > Self-censorship increase persistence maintenance

exposure_network_assignment.edge_meaning: The source position is a visible peer whose output was plausibly exposed to the target position; derived from source user liking, reposting, or quoting target user content in the raw data.
